parameters.query:
INSERT INTO jobs (
  prompt_p1, topic, keywords, category,
  use_media, upload_target, template_id,
  clips, clip_duration, slide_duration,
  aspect_ratio, production_mode, generated_images,
  metadata, prompt_lang_detected, needs_translation,
  production_id, narration_script,
  enable_bgm, enable_sfx, bgm_url,
  bgm_mode, sfx_mode, sfx_file_url,
  prompt_hash, duration, strict_mode, verify_mode, engine_type,
  narration_style, narration_tone,
  status, retry_count, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.prompt_p1 }}',
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  '{{ $json.keywords }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.use_media }}',
  '{{ $json.upload_target }}',
  {{ $json.template_id ? `'${$json.template_id}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.clips) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.clip_duration }},
  {{ $json.slide_duration }},
  '{{ $json.aspect_ratio }}',
  '{{ $json.production_mode }}',
  '{{ $json.generated_images || '[]' }}'::jsonb,
  {{ (() => { const m = {}; if ($json.scenes && $json.scenes.length > 0) { m.scenes = $json.scenes; m.scenes_warning = $json.scenes_warning || ''; } if ($json.narration_start_sec !== null && $json.narration_start_sec !== undefined) { m.narration_start_sec = $json.narration_start_sec; } if ($json.voice_provider && $json.voice_provider !== 'tts') { m.voice_provider = $json.voice_provider; } if ($json.kling_group_shots) { m.kling_group_shots = $json.kling_group_shots; } return Object.keys(m).length > 0 ? `'${JSON.stringify(m)}'::jsonb` : ($json.metadata ? `'${JSON.stringify($json.metadata)}'::jsonb` : 'NULL'); })() }},
  '{{ $json.prompt_lang_detected }}',
  {{ $json.needs_translation }},
  {{ $json.production_id ? `'${$json.production_id}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ ($json.narration_script || $json.narration_text) ? `'${$json.narration_script || $json.narration_text}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.enable_bgm }},
  {{ $json.enable_sfx }},
  {{ $json.bgm_url ? `'${$json.bgm_url}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.bgm_mode || "none" }}',
  '{{ $json.sfx_mode || "none" }}',
  {{ $json.sfx_file_url ? `'${$json.sfx_file_url}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.prompt_hash ? `'${$json.prompt_hash}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.duration !== null && $json.duration !== undefined ? $json.duration : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.strict_mode }},
  {{ $json.verify_mode }},
  '{{ $json.engine_type }}',
  '{{ $json.narration_style }}',
  '{{ $json.narration_tone }}',
  'queued', 0, NOW(), NOW()
) RETURNING id, status, created_at, production_id;
